titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Husband and the Wife

text: 5612 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ حُكَيْمٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ اَلْحَسَنِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ عَنْ مُشْمَعِلٍّ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اِمْرَأَةٍ مَاتَتْ وَ تَرَكَتْ زَوْجَهَا وَ لاَ وَارِثَ لَهَا غَيْرُهُ قَالَ "إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ غَيْرُهُ فَالْمَالُ لَهُ وَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ لَهَا اَلرُّبُعُ وَ مَا بَقِيَ فَلِلْإِمَامِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5612 - Mu'awiyah ibn Hakeem narrated from Ali ibn Al-Hasan ibn Zayd from Mushma'il from Abu Basir who said: I asked Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about a woman who passed away and left behind her husband with no other heirs.
Imam (as) said: "If there are no other heirs, the wealth belongs to him. For a woman, she receives one-fourth, and whatever remains belongs to the Imam (as)."

text: 5613 - مَا رَوَاهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اِمْرَأَةٍ مَاتَتْ وَ تَرَكَتْ زَوْجَهَا قَالَ "فَالْمَالُ كُلُّهُ لَهُ" قُلْتُ اَلرَّجُلُ يَمُوتُ وَ يَتْرُكُ اِمْرَأَتَهُ قَالَ "اَلْمَالُ لَهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5613 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Aban ibn Uthman from Abu Basir who reported from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) regarding a woman who passed away and left behind her husband.
Imam (as) said: "All the wealth belongs to him."
I asked: "What if a man dies and leaves behind his wife?"
Imam (as) replied: "The wealth belongs to her."
